_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in reviewing and editing plans.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone tracking, risk registers, budget status, and decision requests.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.495), AB-S-003 (AB, cosine: 0.490).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.2/10 (raw 0.322). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [editing, plans, reviewing] vs WIDAI-only terms [budget, decision, executive, level, milestone, producing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.887 (P=0.912, R=0.864). P exceeds R by 0.049 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (81.9%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in reviewing and editing plans." and "Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.527 > STS 0.322 (gap +0.206). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [editing, plans, reviewing]. WIDAI-only: [budget, decision, executive, level, milestone, producing].
